title: Action Execution Sequence and Audit Plan

sequence_for_future_admin_or_editor_acti.name: validate_action_allowlist
sequence_for_future_admin_or_editor_acti.description: Confirm action is allowed for role.

sequence_for_future_admin_or_editor_acti.name: validate_hash_and_status
sequence_for_future_admin_or_editor_acti.description: Compare supplied current status and hash with server-side record.

sequence_for_future_admin_or_editor_acti.name: validate_transition
sequence_for_future_admin_or_editor_acti.description: Check requested status transition against AG14E model.

sequence_for_future_admin_or_editor_acti.name: create_audit_record
sequence_for_future_admin_or_editor_acti.description: Create audit record with actor, action, remarks, status, hashes and timestamp.

sequence_for_future_admin_or_editor_acti.name: apply_state_change
sequence_for_future_admin_or_editor_acti.description: Update queue/status/version record only after validation and audit path is ready.

sequence_for_future_admin_or_editor_acti.name: record_post_hash
sequence_for_future_admin_or_editor_acti.description: Capture post-action hash and final state.

sequence_for_future_admin_or_editor_acti.name: return_result
sequence_for_future_admin_or_editor_acti.description: Return action result to UI without exposing secrets.

rollback_model: Every changed queue/status file is versioned or recoverable.
Return for correction preserves Admin remarks and prior version.
Publish requires final Admin confirmation and post-action hash.
Publish and close records closure separately.
